title: Dorsal Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials, adding a Moon that aids in ocean exploration for the night.
body:
During the Dorsal Moon event, you will be welcomed by double the dolphins and half the drowned, being granted with infinite water breathing for the night. During a Super Dorsal Moon, glow squid spawns will be doubled and you will be granted with increased swimming speed via the Dolphin's Grace status effect. Take the time to hunt for treasure and explore the ocean!

All credit for Enhanced Celestials goes to the original author CorgiTaco.

Credit as well to Draconic Archer for making many other add-ons for Enhanced Celestials!
